description: Amazon Bedrock models served through the Bedrock Runtime and Converse APIs.
regional_pricing_notes: Provider-level Bedrock pricing is represented as source-region pricing because this provider includes Claude and non-Claude model families. Claude Sonnet 4.5, Claude Haiku 4.5, Claude Opus 4.5, and future Claude model regional or geographic endpoint premiums are documented on the affected Claude pricing rows.
prompt_training_notes: AWS says Amazon Bedrock inputs and outputs are never shared with model providers and are not used to train base models.
